---
title: "Projections"
description: "The SABRhood daily simulation laboratory."
---

::: {.page-intro .page-intro--dark}
<span class="eyebrow">Simulation laboratory</span>

# From starting lineups to the manager's final bullpen decision

The simulation roadmap now includes an auditable manager-hook model and a leverage-aware reliever selector - the bridge between the starter engine and a complete game simulation.
:::

::: {.roadmap-grid}
::: {.roadmap-card .is-complete}
<span class="roadmap-step">01</span>

## Starter matchup engine

Validated event probabilities, explicit lineups, reproducible seeds, and compact outputs.
:::

::: {.roadmap-card .is-active}
<span class="roadmap-step">02</span>

## Bullpen entry

Hook probability, recent workload, pitcher handedness, batter side, and leverage-aware reliever selection.
:::

::: {.roadmap-card}
<span class="roadmap-step">03</span>

## Calibration

Backtests, uncertainty bands, park and opponent adjustments, and documented model versions.
:::
:::

::: {.method-callout}
Daily public projections will appear here only after time-based backtesting and calibration checks pass. This page intentionally does not present experimental probabilities as betting advice.
:::

{{< include includes/projections-model.html >}}
